source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two of the charges have magnitude \( q \) and are positive, and two are negative with the same magnitude. What is the magnitude of the net electric field at the center of the square due to the four charges?

choices are provided, enabling answer matching against a fixed candidate set.
registry_passed=true, answer_present=true, and the expected result can be checked with standard electrostatics derivation rules.
